coreJobStatement: Generate and deliver thermal energy to occupied spaces and domestic hot-water systems via heated-water circuits [SRC: VN_heating_equipment]
lPath: L7 Hydronic Heating Equipment Ecosystem > L6.2 Hydraulic Distribution > L5.2.5 Flow Sensing & Measurement > L4.2.5.1 Ultrasonic Flow Sensor

segments.name: New-build residential
segments.characteristics: Greenfield installation with design freedom; low-temperature emitters preferred (radiant floor); condensing boiler mandated by regulation
segments.circumstance: Greenfield installation with design freedom; low-temperature emitters preferred (radiant floor); condensing boiler mandated by regulation
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — system design starts from scratch

segments.name: Retrofit residential
segments.characteristics: Replacing existing boiler in occupied dwelling; constrained pipe routing, existing radiators, limited space; must maintain comfort during swap
segments.circumstance: Replacing existing boiler in occupied dwelling; constrained pipe routing, existing radiators, limited space; must maintain comfort during swap
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — high-temp emitters constrain boiler selection

segments.name: Light commercial (office, retail, hospitality)
segments.characteristics: Multi-zone buildings with diverse occupancy profiles; BMS integration expected; energy audit/reporting mandated
segments.circumstance: Multi-zone buildings with diverse occupancy profiles; BMS integration expected; energy audit/reporting mandated
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — zone balancing complexity, regulatory reporting

segments.name: Multi-family / social housing
segments.characteristics: Centralized plant with per-unit metering; tenant billing requires measured energy; compliance with EU EED individual metering mandate
segments.circumstance: Centralized plant with per-unit metering; tenant billing requires measured energy; compliance with EU EED individual metering mandate

segments.name: Industrial process heating
segments.characteristics: Hydronic circuits for process heat (not space heating); tighter temperature control, higher duty cycles, harsher media conditions
segments.targetabilityReason: duty cycle and media constraints differ
segments.circumstance: Hydronic circuits for process heat (not space heating); tighter temperature control, higher duty cycles, harsher media conditions
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — duty cycle and media constraints differ

segments.name: Solar-hybrid / renewable integration
segments.characteristics: Combining solar thermal with boiler backup; variable source temperatures; storage management; maximizing solar fraction
segments.circumstance: Combining solar thermal with boiler backup; variable source temperatures; storage management; maximizing solar fraction
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — multi-source orchestration, low delta-T operation

segments.name: Pool/spa
segments.characteristics: Outdoor or indoor pool heating; large water volumes, chemical treatment, seasonal operation
segments.targetabilityReason: different media chemistry and volume scale
segments.circumstance: Outdoor or indoor pool heating; large water volumes, chemical treatment, seasonal operation
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — different media chemistry and volume scale

alternatives.name: Impeller / Turbine Flow Sensor (incumbent)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Moving parts subject to magnetite fouling, bearing wear, and particulate jamming; paramagnetic MnO₂ attracted to magnetized rotor; calibration drift from blade erosion; 3–5 year service life in hard-water areas [SRC: web_search — HeatingHelp, BoilerMag]

alternatives.name: Ultrasonic Flow Sensor (transit-time)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Accuracy degrades with >2% air entrainment; requires pipe-full condition; higher unit cost vs turbine; signal loss in partially filled pipes [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

alternatives.name: Vortex Flow Sensor
alternatives.tradeoffs: Introduces pressure drop (bluff body obstructs flow); limited accuracy at low flow rates below Reynolds threshold; vibration-sensitive [SRC: VN_heating_equipment]

alternatives.name: Differential Pressure Estimation (from pump curve)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero hardware cost; accuracy ±15–20%; no direct measurement; depends on pump curve validity; cannot detect anomalies [SRC: VN_heating_equipment]

alternatives.name: Do nothing / accept risk [Status Quo]
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero cost, zero lifecycle burden; thermal output unverified; no fault detection; cannot comply with EU EcoDesign measured-efficiency requirements; energy waste undetectable

jobSteps.description: the required flow rate range, pipe diameter, medium type, temperature envelope, and communication protocol for the hydronic circuit
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Sensor specifications must match circuit design parameters
jobSteps.rawStatement: Define the required flow rate range, pipe diameter, medium type, temperature envelope, and communication protocol for the hydronic circuit
jobSteps.rationale: Sensor specifications must match circuit design parameters

jobSteps.description: and access the optimal insertion point in the hydronic piping where flow profile is developed and straight-run requirements are met
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Physical installation position directly affects measurement accuracy
jobSteps.rawStatement: Locate and access the optimal insertion point in the hydronic piping where flow profile is developed and straight-run requirements are met
jobSteps.rationale: Physical installation position directly affects measurement accuracy

jobSteps.description: the piping section, electrical connections, and controller interface for sensor integration
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Mechanical and electrical integration is core to product installation
jobSteps.rawStatement: Prepare the piping section, electrical connections, and controller interface for sensor integration
jobSteps.rationale: Mechanical and electrical integration is core to product installation

jobSteps.description: sensor readiness: verify pipe-full condition, absence of air locks, correct wiring, and communication handshake with controller
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Pre-operation verification critical for measurement validity
jobSteps.rawStatement: Confirm sensor readiness: verify pipe-full condition, absence of air locks, correct wiring, and communication handshake with controller
jobSteps.rationale: Pre-operation verification critical for measurement validity

jobSteps.description: continuous flow measurement, providing real-time volumetric flow rate, temperature, and diagnostic data to the system controller
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: This IS the core value-creating action of the product
jobSteps.rawStatement: Execute continuous flow measurement, providing real-time volumetric flow rate, temperature, and diagnostic data to the system controller
jobSteps.rationale: This IS the core value-creating action of the product

jobSteps.description: measurement quality indicators: signal strength, air bubble events, empty-pipe alarms, calibration drift flags
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Ongoing measurement integrity affects system performance
jobSteps.rawStatement: Monitor measurement quality indicators: signal strength, air bubble events, empty-pipe alarms, calibration drift flags
jobSteps.rationale: Ongoing measurement integrity affects system performance

stakeholders.who: HVAC installer / commissioning technician — installs and configures the sensor
Boiler OEM engineering manager — accountable for appliance performance and certification
Building occupant / facility manager — receives thermal comfort
Specifier (heating design engineer), installer, commissioning tech, service technician, disposer
OEM procurement manager / HVAC wholesaler buyer
Building regulations inspector, energy auditor, consulting engineer
